_comment: Pinned cross-provider model map + prices for the miner LLM proxy. Each entry gives a model's id on every supported provider and its price per 1M tokens (USD, input/output) on each. The proxy rewrites an incoming request's `model` to the active provider (NPA_PROXY_PROVIDER), allows ONLY models listed here, and meters spend using that provider's price. Verify ids and prices against each provider and keep this file pinned so every validator enforces the same set.
